rulings.Case Title: JADE CHAPMAN VS. CHOICE HOTELS INTERNATIONAL, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Bridget A Mckinstry
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 3, 2023 line 1. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. No Second Amended Complaint on file. The Court notes that there is no order re: Demurrer and Motion to Strike on the Frist Amended Complaint on file. Parties are ordered to immediately provide proposed orders for execution in accordance with CRC 3.1312 and submission instructions on the Court's web-site. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: IRIS ADAMS ET AL VS. 1880 PINE LP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 3, 2023 line 2. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED without leave to amend. Third Amended Complaint fails to allege facts (not conclusions) with particularity regarding malice, oppression or fraud as to the corporate defendants. Opposition (which appears to be substantively identical to the previously filed opposition re: Motion to Strike Second Amended Complaint) does not include any proposed amendments that could satisfy the pleading requirements. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
